topic: two-step equations with substitution and negative numbers
latex: If $2x+3y = 4$ and $y = 34$, what is the value of $x$?
notes: }  \textbf{Answer:} Substituting $y$, we obtain $2x+3(34) = 4$. Solving for $x$, we obtain:  \begin{align*} 2x+3(34) &= 4\\ \Rightarrow \qquad 2x + 102 &= 4\\ \Rightarrow \qquad 2x &= -98\\ \Rightarrow \qquad x &= \boxed{-49} \end{align*} }
